name: finalize() Method Without super.finalize()
description: A Java class overrides finalize() without calling super.finalize(), preventing proper cleanup of parent class resources. This violates the Java Language Specification recommendation and can lead to resource leaks.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL node (Java class) overrides finalize() method with a CONTROL node that does not include a call to STRUCTURAL(super.finalize). The parent class cleanup chain is broken.
